reviews.comment:
Este lugar me sorprendió para bien, lo único negativo del lugar fueron los precios del mercado (un agua grande $2000 febrero 2024), después la oferta gastronómica del lugar me resultó muy superadora respecto de las YPF de CABA. Lo mejor de todo es el patio de fondo con mesas, bancos, parrillas con incluso las rejillas, juegos infantiles, piletas con agua fría, baños limpios, mucha sombra y una vegetación preciosa. Súper recomendable

(Translated by Google)
This place pleasantly surprised me. The only downside was the market prices (a large bottle of water cost $2000 in February 2024). Otherwise, the food was far superior to the YPF gas stations in Buenos Aires. The best part is the back patio with tables, benches, grills (even the grates!), a children's playground, cold-water pools, clean restrooms, plenty of shade, and beautiful greenery. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0bklxZnBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Paré a tomar un desayuno, el full, no cuenta con la app de serviclub, sí hacen el 10% de descuento a socios presentando el carnet. Tampoco cargan los puntos serviclub.
No es una estación de servicio cualquiera, es del ACA, y que no cuenten con la app de YPF, me parece de terror.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped for breakfast, the full option, and they don't have the Serviclub app, although they do offer a 10% discount to members who show their membership card. They also don't accept Serviclub points.
It's not just any gas station; it's an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) station, and the fact that they don't have the YPF app is appalling.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0bmZPX0xREAE

reviews.comment:
La atención muy mala ...te tratan como ort/o en el serví compras..
Me toco presenciar como la chica chiquita y el grandote la trataban re mal a la cajera pobre piba.
Ni te saludan el café muy malo.. tiene que ajustar la temperatura para que no se queme.
Después les hablas y ni pelota..se la pasan con el celular

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible... they treat you like dirt at the checkout. I witnessed the short girl and the big guy treating the cashier terribly; poor girl. They don't even greet you, and the coffee is awful... they have to adjust the temperature so it doesn't burn. Then you talk to them and they don't even acknowledge you... they're always on their phones.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0a3Q2aVdBEAE
